description: Write /etc/puppetlabs/puppet/puppet.conf with server identity and optional DNS alt names

certname.description: Certificate name for this node; defaults to the system FQDN

server.description: Hostname of the OpenVox Server; defaults to the system FQDN

ca_server.description: CA server hostname; set on compile masters to point to the primary

dns_alt_names.description: Comma-separated list of DNS alternative names for the server certificate
